name: alert_action_var_chain
prompt: Author a FortiSOAR playbook with a manual trigger that fetches alert records via a `find_record` step on the `alerts` module, then references the fetched data in a downstream `set_variable` step using `{{ vars.steps.<step_name>.result }}`. Make sure the variable reference uses the underscore-joined step display name (NOT the YAML id), and emit the complete YAML.
notes: Tests the vars.steps.<name> rule that LLMs frequently get wrong (use id or UUID instead).
